# Otter Quotes

> The first platform that delivers fully executed contracts to roofing and exterior contractors for insurance-related repair and retail projects.

Otter Quotes is a technology platform based in Zionsville, Indiana that helps homeowners and contractors navigate property damage repair projects across the United States. After a homeowner files their own insurance claim, Otter Quotes gathers the loss sheet, coordinates aerial measurements, facilitates material and color selection, runs a competitive bidding process, and delivers a fully executed contract to the winning contractor — ready to start work. Homeowners pay nothing to use the platform. Contractors pay a percentage-based platform fee only on signed contracts they win.

Otter Quotes does not represent homeowners in their insurance claims and is not a public adjuster. The platform organizes and executes the contractor selection process after a claim has been filed.

## How It Works for Homeowners

- File your own property damage claim with your insurance carrier
- Upload your loss sheet and project details at [otterquote.com/get-started](https://otterquote.com/get-started.html)
- Select materials and colors using Hover's aerial 3D design tool
- Receive bids from licensed, insured contractors in your area
- Compare bids and sign with your chosen contractor through the platform
- Otter Quotes delivers a fully executed agreement — no paperwork chasing

## How It Works for Contractors

- Join at [otterquote.com/contractor-join](https://otterquote.com/contractor-join.html)
- Browse available project opportunities in your service area
- Submit bids with your pricing, warranty terms, and materials
- Receive signed contracts — not leads
- Platform delivers: executed agreement, insurance loss sheet, Hover aerial measurements, full material specifications, and homeowner contact details
- Pay a percentage-based platform fee only on signed contracts you win
